cards.front: What is the Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: A lecture method where the teacher writes on the board and explains the topic to the students
A multimedia presentation that uses slides, images, and animations to convey information

cards.front: What is the main disadvantage of Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: Students may not actively participate in the learning process

cards.front: What is the advantage of using PowerPoint Presentation?
cards.back: Students can take notes, review the material, and engage with the content on their own pace

cards.front: What is the key characteristic of a Rooted Tree?
cards.back: A tree with a single starting node or root vertex
